scope: Validated Cyclades medium-to-high wind-profile evidence batch 1

policy.meaningOfHigh: High confidence here proves wind-exposure / wind-sport behavior, not calm or protected swimming.

excluded.name: Pounta
excluded.reason: Name/identity ambiguity: app coordinates match the east/southeast Punda Coast beach, while many kite references describe the west Pounda channel opposite Antiparos.

excluded.name: Paralia Agkali Chrysis Aktis
excluded.reason: Close to Golden Beach cluster, but the evidence is less exact than Tserdakia/Golden Beach itself.

supports: north-facing beach receiving direct onshore Meltemi
summer 15-22 kt Meltemi and chop/waves in Meltemi
center located at New Golden Beach / Tserdakia
consistent Meltemi wind / PWA World Cup spot context
New Golden Beach / Tserdakia faces directly into the Meltemi
same Tsoukalia / Paros spot coordinates around 37.08, 25.26
15-25 kt summer wind and moderate chop
